item.title: The Truth About Eating Beans
item.description: A simple look at beans and how they can fit into everyday meals.

item.title: 3 Easy Meals from One Can of Chickpeas
item.description: Make three simple meals with one can of chickpeas using a practical, budget-friendly approach from That Practical Mom.

item.title: The Cheapest Meal Base
item.description: A simple, budget-friendly meal base idea from That Practical Mom to help make everyday cooking easier and more organized.
